title: Perform ground-based rigging
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform ground-based rigging demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assist in preparation of work site

pcs.text: Confirm work instructions and location of worksite with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm work instructions and location of worksite with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm work instructions and location of worksite with supervisor.

pcs.text: Confirm workplace health and safety hazards and controls in job safety analysis (JSA) with supervisor

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm workplace health and safety hazards and controls in job safety analysis (JSA) with supervisor.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm availability of first aid and emergency personnel, equipment and procedures.

elements.title: Prepare for rigging

pcs.text: Identify tree defects and contribute to tree assessment process

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify tree defects and contribute to tree assessment process.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss and confirm rigging method with work team.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm rigging method complies with identified risk controls with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm rigging method complies with identified risk controls with supervisor.

pcs.text: Select rigging equipment and check for defects, removing defective equipment from service
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select rigging equipment and check for defects, removing defective equipment from service?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select rigging equipment and check for defects, removing defective equipment from service.

pcs.text: Select, check and use personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and use personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and use personal protective equipment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare for rigging

elements.title: Perform rigging operations

pcs.text: Communicate with work team during operations according to work site and environmental conditions, using methods agreed with work team

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate with work team during operations according to work site and environmental conditions, using methods agreed with work team.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Tie, dress, set and finish rigging knots and hitches according to rigging system requirements.

pcs.text: Monitor rigging system, work team movements and environmental conditions to ensure safe working conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor rigging system, work team movements and environmental conditions to ensure safe working conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor rigging system, work team movements and environmental conditions to ensure safe working conditions.

pcs.text: Control load to drop zone and adjust rigging according to aerial worker directions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Control load to drop zone and adjust rigging according to aerial worker directions.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Disconnect load from rigging system.

pcs.text: Re-check rigging equipment components for defects, and remove defective equipment from service
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Re-check rigging equipment components for defects, and remove defective equipment from service?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Re-check rigging equipment components for defects, and remove defective equipment from service.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Return rigging components to aerial work team?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Return rigging components to aerial work team.
